# Collaborative Freeform Drawing Canvas with Liveblocks

## Background

You are extending an existing Next.js (App Router) scaffold to build a real-time multiplayer freeform drawing canvas backed by https://liveblocks.io/. The scaffold already wires up the `LiveblocksProvider` + `RoomProvider`, an authentication endpoint, and renders an empty canvas with a toolbar. Your job is to implement the actual collaborative drawing behavior so that multiple users can draw strokes together in real time, erase each other's strokes, and selectively undo only their own strokes.

The project lives at `/home/user/myproject`. Real Liveblocks cloud is used; mocking the Liveblocks WebSocket layer is **not allowed**. The credentials are provided through the environment variables `LIVEBLOCKS_SECRET_KEY` (server) and `NEXT_PUBLIC_LIVEBLOCKS_PUBLIC_KEY` (client).

## Requirements

* Maintain a Liveblocks `Storage` shape of:
  ```ts
  type Storage = {
    strokes: LiveList<LiveObject<{
      id: string;        // unique per stroke
      userId: string;    // identifies the author of this stroke
      color: string;     // CSS color
      width: number;     // stroke width in px
      points: LiveList<LiveObject<{ x: number; y: number }>>;
    }>>
  };
  ```
* A toolbar lets the user pick a stroke color and width. The toolbar must also expose:
  * A tool selector that toggles between **Pen** (default) and **Eraser**.
  * An **Undo my last stroke** button.
* While the **Pen** tool is selected:
  * `pointerdown` on the canvas creates a new stroke (new `LiveObject` pushed to the `strokes` `LiveList`) with the current color, width, and a single starting point. The new stroke must include a `userId` matching the current user's identity (from the auth endpoint).
  * `pointermove` events append additional `{x, y}` points to the active stroke's `points` `LiveList`. Network updates from pointer movement must be throttled at roughly 30 ms (i.e., at most one point appended per \~30 ms).
  * `pointerup` finalizes the stroke.
* While the **Eraser** tool is selected, clicking on a stroke removes that whole stroke from the `LiveList` (via `LiveList.delete`).
* The canvas renders all strokes as SVG `<polyline>` elements. Each polyline must:
  * Use the stroke's color and width.
  * Have a stable `data-stroke-id` attribute equal to the stroke's `id`.
  * Have a `data-user-id` attribute equal to the stroke's `userId`.
* The **Undo my last stroke** button removes only the most recently created stroke whose `userId` matches the current user. It must not touch strokes created by other users.
* The room name must be derived from `ZEALT_RUN_ID`: `liveblocks-drawing-${ZEALT_RUN_ID}`. Use this room for both the `RoomProvider` and any room-scoped auth. The evaluation harness only injects `ZEALT_RUN_ID` (server-side); you **MUST** re-export it as `NEXT_PUBLIC_ZEALT_RUN_ID` so the browser bundle can read it (e.g. set `env.NEXT_PUBLIC_ZEALT_RUN_ID = process.env.ZEALT_RUN_ID` inside `next.config.js`, or write it into `.env`/`.env.local` during build). `NEXT_PUBLIC_ZEALT_RUN_ID` must mirror `ZEALT_RUN_ID` exactly.
* The current user's `userId` must be sourced from a request query parameter `?user=<id>` on `/` so two browsers can join as different users; the auth endpoint must use the same id when calling `session.allow` / `prepareSession`.

## Implementation Hints

* Use `@liveblocks/client` `LiveList`, `LiveObject` together with `@liveblocks/react` hooks `useStorage`, `useMutation`, and `useSelf`.
* `LiveList` exposes `push(value)` and `delete(index)`; use them to add and remove strokes/points.
* `useMutation` provides a `storage` root from which you can call `.get("strokes")` to access the live `LiveList`.
* Throttle pointermove updates with a small timestamp/`requestAnimationFrame`-style guard so you append at most one point every \~30 ms.
* Render the canvas inside an SVG element so `<polyline>` can be used directly for each stroke. Convert points to the `points="x1,y1 x2,y2 ..."` format expected by SVG.
* The scaffold already includes a `lib/liveblocks.ts` (or equivalent) module exporting typed hooks. Reuse those instead of creating a duplicate context.
* The room id derivation MUST read `ZEALT_RUN_ID` server-side and be exposed to the client.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Project path: /home/user/myproject
* Start command: `npm run dev`
* Port: 3000
* Routes:
  * `GET /?user=<id>`: Renders the collaborative drawing page for the given user id. The page must contain:
    * An SVG element with `data-testid="canvas"` and a fixed viewport (at least 800x600 px).
    * A color picker with `data-testid="color-picker"` (must accept any CSS color string and reflect the selection in subsequent strokes).
    * A width selector with `data-testid="width-picker"` (numeric input/select; values 1-32 supported).
    * A tool selector with `data-testid="tool-pen"` and `data-testid="tool-eraser"` buttons (Pen is selected by default).
    * An undo button with `data-testid="undo-mine"`.
  * `POST /api/liveblocks-auth`: Authenticates a Liveblocks session for the user passed in the request body; must use the real Liveblocks Node SDK and the `LIVEBLOCKS_SECRET_KEY` env var.
* Realtime behavior:
  * Drawing a stroke (pointerdown -> pointermove -> pointerup) on user A's canvas results in a new `<polyline data-stroke-id="..." data-user-id="A">` appearing on **both** A's and B's canvases within a few seconds.
  * When user B selects the eraser tool and clicks on A's polyline, the polyline is removed for **both** A and B.
  * After user A draws two strokes and clicks **Undo my last stroke**, the most recent stroke authored by A is removed and the earlier stroke remains. Strokes authored by other users are not affected.
* Liveblocks usage:
  * The Liveblocks WebSocket connection is real; no mock client / fake transport is used.
  * The room name is exactly `liveblocks-drawing-${ZEALT_RUN_ID}`.

2. Toolbar with color picker, width picker, pen/eraser toggle, undo button
3. Drawing behavior with pointer events
4. Eraser removes entire strokes
5. Undo only removes current user's last stroke
6. Room name from `ZEALT_RUN_ID`
7. User ID from query parameter `?user=<id>`
8. SVG canvas with polylines
9. Throttled pointer movement (~30ms)
10. Specific data-testid attributes

```tsx
import React, { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { LiveList, LiveObject } from "@liveblocks/client";
import { useStorage, useMutation, useSelf } from "@/lib/liveblocks";

type Tool = "pen" | "eraser";

export function CanvasScaffold({ userId }: { userId: string }) {
  const [tool, setTool] = useState<Tool>("pen");
  const [color, setColor] = useState<string>("#000000");
  const [width, setWidth] = useState<number>(4);
  
  const activeStrokeIdRef = useRef<string | null>(null);
  const lastPointTimeRef = useRef<number>(0);
  const svgRef = useRef<SVGSVGElement>(null);
  
  // Read strokes from storage

    const strokes = root.strokes;
    const result: Array<{
      id: string;
      userId: string;
      color: string;
      width: number;
      points: Array<{ x: number; y: number }>;
    }> = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < strokes.length; i++) {
      const stroke = strokes.get(i);
      result.push({
        id: stroke.get("id"),
        userId: stroke.get("userId"),
        color: stroke.get("color"),
        width: stroke.get("width"),
        points: stroke.get("points").map((p) => ({
          x: p.get("x"),
          y: p.get("y"),
        })),
      });
    }
    return result;
  }) ?? [];
  
  // Mutations
  const startStroke = useMutation(({ storage }, strokeId: string, userId: string, color: string, width: number, x: number, y: number) => {
    const strokes = storage.get("strokes");
    strokes.push(new LiveObject({
      id: strokeId,
      userId,
      color,
      width,
      points: new LiveList([new LiveObject({ x, y })]),
    }));
  }, []);
  
  const addPoint = useMutation(({ storage }, strokeId: string, x: number, y: number) => {
    const strokes = storage.get("strokes");
    for (let i = 0; i < strokes.length; i++) {
      const stroke = strokes.get(i);
      if (stroke.get("id") === strokeId) {
        stroke.get("points").push(new LiveObject({ x, y }));
        break;
      }
    }
  }, []);
  
  const deleteStroke = useMutation(({ storage }, strokeId: string) => {
    const strokes = storage.get("strokes");
    for (let i = 0; i < strokes.length; i++) {
      if (strokes.get(i).get("id") === strokeId) {
        strokes.delete(i);
        break;
      }
    }
  }, []);
  
  const undoMyLastStroke = useMutation(({ storage }, userId: string) => {
    const strokes = storage.get("strokes");
    for (let i = strokes.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
      if (strokes.get(i).get("userId") === userId) {
        strokes.delete(i);
        break;
      }
    }

    const svg = svgRef.current!;
    const rect = svg.getBoundingClientRect();
    return {
      x: ((e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width) * 1024,
      y: ((e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height) * 720,
    };
  }, []);
  
  // Pointer handlers

    if (tool !== "pen") return;
    e.currentTarget.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);
    const { x, y } = getSvgPoint(e);
    const strokeId = crypto.randomUUID();
    activeStrokeIdRef.current = strokeId;
    lastPointTimeRef.current = Date.now();
    startStroke(strokeId, userId, color, width, x, y);
  }, [tool, userId, color, width, getSvgPoint, startStroke]);
  
  const handlePointerMove = useCallback((e: React.PointerEvent<SVGSVGElement>) => {
    if (!activeStrokeIdRef.current) return;

    if (now - lastPointTimeRef.current < 30) return;

  }, []);

      deleteStroke(strokeId);
    }
  }, [tool, deleteStroke]);

  const handleUndo = useCallback(() => {
    undoMyLastStroke(userId);
  }, [userId, undoMyLastStroke]);
  
  return (
    <div style={{ padding: 16 }}>
      <h1>Collaborative Drawing</h1>
      <p>
        User: <strong data-testid="current-user">{userId}</strong>
      </p>
      <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 8, marginBottom: 12, alignItems: "center" }}>
        <label>
          Color
          <input
            data-testid="color-picker"
            type="text"
            value={color}
            onChange={(e) => setColor(e.target.value)}
            style={{ marginLeft: 4, width: 96 }}
          />
        </label>
        <label>
          Width
          <input
            data-testid="width-picker"
            type="number"
            min={1}
            max={32}
            value={width}
            onChange={(e) => setWidth(Number(e.target.value))}
            style={{ marginLeft: 4, width: 64 }}
          />
        </label>
        <button
          data-testid="tool-pen"
          onClick={() => setTool("pen")}
          aria-pressed={tool === "pen"}
        >
          Pen
        </button>
        <button
          data-testid="tool-eraser"
          onClick={() => setTool("eraser")}
          aria-pressed={tool === "eraser"}
        >
          Eraser
        </button>
        <button data-testid="undo-mine" onClick={handleUndo}>
          Undo my last stroke
        </button>
      </div>
      <svg
        ref={svgRef}
        data-testid="canvas"
        width={1024}
        height={720}
        viewBox="0 0 1024 720"
        style={{ background: "#fafafa", border: "1px solid #ddd", cursor: tool === "pen" ? "crosshair" : "pointer" }}
        onPointerDown={handlePointerDown}
        onPointerMove={handlePointerMove}
        onPointerUp={handlePointerUp}
      >
        {strokesData.map((stroke) => (
          <polyline
            key={stroke.id}
            data-stroke-id={stroke.id}
            data-user-id={stroke.userId}
            points={stroke.points.map((p) => `${p.x},${p.y}`).join(" ")}

            strokeLinecap="round"

            onPointerDown={(e) => {

                e.stopPropagation();
                handleStrokeClick(stroke.id);
              }
            }}
          />
        ))}
      </svg>
    </div>
  );
}
```

```ts
import { Liveblocks } from "@liveblocks/node";
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";

const secret = process.env.LIVEBLOCKS_SECRET_KEY;

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  if (!secret) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Missing LIVEBLOCKS_SECRET_KEY" }, { status: 500 });
  }

  const liveblocks = new Liveblocks({ secret });

  // Accept the user id either from the request body, query, or referer.
  let userId: string | undefined;
  try {
    const body = (await req.json().catch(() => ({}))) as { userId?: string; user?: string };
    userId = body.userId || body.user;
  } catch {
    // ignore
  }
  if (!userId) {
    const url = new URL(req.url);
    userId = url.searchParams.get("user") || undefined;
  }
  if (!userId) {
    const referer = req.headers.get("referer");
    if (referer) {
      try {
        const u = new URL(referer).searchParams.get("user");
        if (u) userId = u;
      } catch {
        // ignore
      }
    }
  }
  if (!userId) userId = "anonymous";

  const runId = process.env.ZEALT_RUN_ID || "local-dev";
  const roomId = `liveblocks-drawing-${runId}`;

  const session = liveblocks.prepareSession(userId, {
    userInfo: { name: userId },
  });
  session.allow(roomId, session.FULL_ACCESS);

  const { status, body } = await session.authorize();
  return new NextResponse(body, {
    status,
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
  });
}
```

```tsx
"use client";

import React, { useCallback, useRef, useState } from "react";
import { LiveList, LiveObject } from "@liveblocks/client";
import { useStorage, useMutation } from "@/lib/liveblocks";

type Tool = "pen" | "eraser";

export function CanvasScaffold({ userId }: { userId: string }) {
  const [tool, setTool] = useState<Tool>("pen");
  const [color, setColor] = useState<string>("#000000");
  const [width, setWidth] = useState<number>(4);

  const activeStrokeIdRef = useRef<string | null>(null);
  const lastPointTimeRef = useRef<number>(0);
  const svgRef = useRef<SVGSVGElement>(null);

  // Read strokes from storage
  const strokesData = useStorage((root) => {
    const strokes = root.strokes;
    const result: Array<{
      id: string;
      userId: string;
      color: string;
      width: number;
      points: Array<{ x: number; y: number }>;
    }> = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < strokes.length; i++) {
      const stroke = strokes.get(i);
      result.push({
        id: stroke.get("id"),
        userId: stroke.get("userId"),
        color: stroke.get("color"),
        width: stroke.get("width"),
        points: stroke.get("points").map((p) => ({
          x: p.get("x"),
          y: p.get("y"),
        })),
      });
    }
    return result;
  }) ?? [];

  // Mutations
  const startStroke = useMutation(({ storage }, strokeId: string, uid: string, c: string, w: number, x: number, y: number) => {
    const strokes = storage.get("strokes");
    strokes.push(
      new LiveObject({
        id: strokeId,
        userId: uid,
        color: c,
        width: w,
        points: new LiveList([new LiveObject({ x, y })]),
      })
    );
  }, []);

  const addPoint = useMutation(({ storage }, strokeId: string, x: number, y: number) => {
    const strokes = storage.get("strokes");
    for (let i = 0; i < strokes.length; i++) {
      const stroke = strokes.get(i);
      if (stroke.get("id") === strokeId) {
        stroke.get("points").push(new LiveObject({ x, y }));
        break;
      }
    }
  }, []);

  const deleteStroke = useMutation(({ storage }, strokeId: string) => {
    const strokes = storage.get("strokes");
    for (let i = 0; i < strokes.length; i++) {
      if (strokes.get(i).get("id") === strokeId) {
        strokes.delete(i);
        break;
      }
    }
  }, []);

  const undoMyLastStroke = useMutation(({ storage }, uid: string) => {
    const strokes = storage.get("strokes");
    for (let i = strokes.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
      if (strokes.get(i).get("userId") === uid) {
        strokes.delete(i);
        break;
      }
    }
  }, []);

  // Get SVG coordinates from pointer event
  const getSvgPoint = useCallback((e: React.PointerEvent<SVGSVGElement> | React.PointerEvent<SVGGElement>) => {
    const svg = svgRef.current!;
    const rect = svg.getBoundingClientRect();
    return {
      x: ((e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width) * 1024,
      y: ((e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height) * 720,
    };
  }, []);

  // Pointer handlers for drawing
  const handlePointerDown = useCallback(
    (e: React.PointerEvent<SVGSVGElement>) => {
      if (tool !== "pen") return;
      e.currentTarget.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);
      const { x, y } = getSvgPoint(e);
      const strokeId = crypto.randomUUID();
      activeStrokeIdRef.current = strokeId;
      lastPointTimeRef.current = Date.now();
      startStroke(strokeId, userId, color, width, x, y);
    },
    [tool, userId, color, width, getSvgPoint, startStroke]
  );

  const handlePointerMove = useCallback(
    (e: React.PointerEvent<SVGSVGElement>) => {
      if (!activeStrokeIdRef.current) return;
      const now = Date.now();
      if (now - lastPointTimeRef.current < 30) return;
      lastPointTimeRef.current = now;
      const { x, y } = getSvgPoint(e);
      addPoint(activeStrokeIdRef.current, x, y);
    },
    [getSvgPoint, addPoint]
  );

  const handlePointerUp = useCallback(() => {
    activeStrokeIdRef.current = null;
  }, []);

  // Eraser handler
  const handleStrokePointerDown = useCallback(
    (e: React.PointerEvent<SVGGElement | SVGPolylineElement>, strokeId: string) => {
      if (tool === "eraser") {
        e.stopPropagation();
        deleteStroke(strokeId);
      }
    },
    [tool, deleteStroke]
  );

  // Undo handler
  const handleUndo = useCallback(() => {
    undoMyLastStroke(userId);
  }, [userId, undoMyLastStroke]);

  return (
    <div style={{ padding: 16 }}>
      <h1>Collaborative Drawing</h1>
      <p>
        User: <strong data-testid="current-user">{userId}</strong>
      </p>
      <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 8, marginBottom: 12, alignItems: "center" }}>
        <label>
          Color
          <input
            data-testid="color-picker"
            type="text"
            value={color}
            onChange={(e) => setColor(e.target.value)}
            style={{ marginLeft: 4, width: 96 }}
          />
        </label>
        <label>
          Width
          <input
            data-testid="width-picker"
            type="number"
            min={1}
            max={32}
            value={width}
            onChange={(e) => setWidth(Number(e.target.value))}
            style={{ marginLeft: 4, width: 64 }}
          />
        </label>
        <button
          data-testid="tool-pen"
          onClick={() => setTool("pen")}
          aria-pressed={tool === "pen"}
        >
          Pen
        </button>
        <button
          data-testid="tool-eraser"
          onClick={() => setTool("eraser")}
          aria-pressed={tool === "eraser"}
        >
          Eraser
        </button>
        <button data-testid="undo-mine" onClick={handleUndo}>
          Undo my last stroke
        </button>
      </div>
      <svg
        ref={svgRef}
        data-testid="canvas"
        width={1024}
        height={720}
        viewBox="0 0 1024 720"
        style={{ background: "#fafafa", border: "1px solid #ddd", cursor: tool === "pen" ? "crosshair" : "pointer" }}
        onPointerDown={handlePointerDown}
        onPointerMove={handlePointerMove}
        onPointerUp={handlePointerUp}
      >
        {strokesData.map((stroke) => (
          <polyline
            key={stroke.id}
            data-stroke-id={stroke.id}
            data-user-id={stroke.userId}
            points={stroke.points.map((p) => `${p.x},${p.y}`).join(" ")}
            stroke={stroke.color}
            strokeWidth={stroke.width}
            fill="none"
            strokeLinecap="round"
            strokeLinejoin="round"
            style={{
              pointerEvents: tool === "eraser" ? "stroke" : "none",
              cursor: tool === "eraser" ? "pointer" : "crosshair",
            }}
            onPointerDown={(e) => handleStrokePointerDown(e, stroke.id)}
          />
        ))}
      </svg>
    </div>
  );
}
```
